review: Absolutely love this app. The interface is clean and everything just works. I've been using it daily for three months and have had zero issues. Customer support responded in under an hour when I had a question.
Decent product but the mobile experience is frustrating. Half the features I use on desktop aren't available on mobile. Also keeps logging me out every few days which is annoying.
This is the worst software I've ever purchased. Constant crashes, data disappeared twice, and support took 2 weeks to respond. Asking for a refund.
Pretty good overall. Does what it says. Onboarding could be smoother — took me a few hours to figure out the advanced filters. Once I got it, though, very powerful.
Life changing for my team. We went from 5 different tools to just this one. The integrations are solid and the reporting saves us hours every week. Worth every penny.
It works fine I guess. Nothing special. Does the job but doesn't wow me. Probably wouldn't switch away from it but also wouldn't recommend it aggressively.
Tried the 14-day trial and immediately bought the annual plan. The batch processing feature alone justifies the price. Super impressed with how fast it handles large datasets.
